name: Bug report
about: Something that should work does not
title: "fix: <short description>"
labels: ["bug", "triage"]
---

## Context

<!-- What were you trying to do? What did you expect to happen? -->

## Observed behavior

<!-- What actually happened. Include the exact command, error, or HTTP response. -->

## Minimal reproduction

```
# paste the smallest command or code snippet that reproduces the issue
```

## Environment

- Commit: `git rev-parse HEAD`
- OS / container: <!-- e.g., macOS 14, Docker 24 -->
- Component: [ ] ml  [ ] api  [ ] web  [ ] infra / docker-compose  [ ] docs

## Severity

- [ ] Blocks the next phase
- [ ] Degrades quality but can ship
- [ ] Cosmetic
